title: Metro Fitness: Brand Identity Package

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
This proposal covers a complete brand identity package for Metro Fitness, including logo design, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines.

The goal is to create a cohesive visual identity that resonates with your target audience and stands out in the competitive fitness market.

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.content:
Logo design (3 concepts, 2 revision rounds)
Color palette definition
Typography selection
Brand guidelines PDF (20+ pages)
Business card design
Social media profile templates

sections.title: Process
sections.content:
Discovery call to understand your vision
Moodboard presentation
Initial concepts delivery
Revision rounds
Final file delivery

investment.description: Complete branding as outlined in scope

startDate: Next business day after starting payment is received
